name: selects
description: AI-powered video editing for Selects. Query transcripts, keep utterances, modify drafts, and install overlays — all from your Claude conversation.
long_description: Selects is a desktop video editing application. This connector exposes Selects' tools to Claude Desktop so you can edit videos through natural conversation. The Selects desktop app must be installed and running for this connector to work. Download Selects at https://cutback.video/selects/install.

tools.name: launch_app
tools.description: Launches the Selects desktop application if it is not already running. Use this when other tools fail with a connection error.

tools.name: scan_directory
tools.description: Scan a directory for media files (video/audio) and return a per-directory summary or file list.

tools.name: probe_media
tools.description: Read media file metadata: codec, duration, timecode, camera, and recording date.

tools.name: compare_audio
tools.description: Compare audio fingerprints to detect files recorded simultaneously (same scene, different cameras/mics).

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create a Selects project from media file(s). Returns a workflowId for tracking progress.

tools.name: get_workflow_status
tools.description: Get the current status of a project creation workflow.

tools.name: wait_workflow
tools.description: Wait for a workflow to reach a terminal state (succeeded/failed/canceled).

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Selects projects.

tools.name: list_project_drafts
tools.description: List drafts in a Selects project.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Query transcripts across one or more Selects projects.

tools.name: query_draft
tools.description: Query an edited sequence (draft) by sequence ID.

tools.name: export_transcript
tools.description: Export a project transcript to a file on disk.

tools.name: create_draft_from_transcript
tools.description: Create a new draft in a project from a transcript-based prompt.

tools.name: export_draft_text
tools.description: Export the dialogue from an edited sequence to a file on disk.

tools.name: draft_inspect
tools.description: Inspect an existing draft sequence.

tools.name: draft_modify
tools.description: Modify an existing draft (add or remove utterances, change keep state).

tools.name: keep_utterances
tools.description: Create a new draft by keeping only the specified utterances from a transcript.

tools.name: install_overlay
tools.description: Install an overlay component on a sequence. The component is sandboxed to the overlay rendering context.

tools.name: update_overlay
tools.description: Update an existing overlay component on a sequence.

tools.name: list_overlays
tools.description: List installed overlays on a sequence.

tools.name: remove_overlay
tools.description: Remove an installed overlay from a sequence.

tools.name: clear_overlays
tools.description: Remove all installed overlays from a sequence.
